@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center


participant "用户" as user #90EEF5 
box ms-trade 	#D3E4FF participant purchaseObj <<Purchase>>  
end box 

box subscribe-service   #FFE6CC    participant itemService<<ItemService >>   
	participant mainNumberSegment<<Main Number Segment>>    
	end box 
	
	box ctsu     #CCE2FE     	
	    participant tokenCache<<Continuous Token Mem Cache>>     
        end box 
        
         box payment-service       #FFFFB8       
          participant eventCalculatorService<<Event Calculator Service>>      
           participant orderManagementService<<Order Management Service>>        
            participant historyCampaignService<<History Campaign Service>>         
             participant campaignRepository<<campaign repository>>          
              participant continuousBilling<<continuous Billing>>           
               participant payNotify<<pay Notify Status>>            
                participant directPaymentServices<<direct Payment Services>>             
                 participant autoAdaptedPayChannels<<auto Adapted Pay Channels>>              
                  participant accountMgmt<<Account Mgt>>               
                   participant authUser<<Auth User>>                
                    participant instance<<instance>>                 
                     participant batchSubscriber<<batch Subscriber>>                  
                      participant redisMsgTopic<<redis Msg Topic>>                   
                       participant xdmPlayxStore<<xdm Playx Store>>                    
                        participant History Order Managerment service<<History Order Manager ment service>>                     
                         participant listen Campaign Service<<listen Campaign Service>>                      
                          participant setEntryInfo<<set Entry Info>>                       
                           participant update Continuous Charging<<update Continuous Charging>>                        
                            participant notifyStatus<<notify Status>>                         
                             participant submit Order<<submit Order>>                          
                              participant create Order<<create Order>>                           
                               participant calculate Price<<calculate Price>>                            
                                participant authenticate<<authenticate>>                             
                                 participant subcribe<<subcribe>>                              
                                  participant fetch Item Subscription<<fetch Item Subscription>>                               
                                   participant get Account Ids by Phone No.<<get Account Ids By Phone No.>>                                
                                    participant check If Auto Renewal Enabled For This Product And Get Its Periodicity In Days From Redis Or DB Config File Based On The Type Of Subscribed Plan Etc., Like Monthly/Yearly etc..If Not Found Then Return Null Value Which Means That There Is Something Wrong With Our System Configuration Files So We Need To Fix It ASAP!!!Otherwise Continue Processing Further Steps Below...And Also Make Sure You Have All Necessary Permissions Set Up Correctly Before Running Any Code Here Otherwise Things Might Go Bad Really Fast!!So Be Careful Out There Folks!!!!Good Luck Everyone :-):-)                                    
                                     participant send Notification Via Email/SMS/Push Notifications Depending Upon What Was Chosen During Registration Process Earlier Today When Signing-Up Online At Website Homepage Screen Displaying Various Options Available Including Free Trial Version Too But Only Last Seven Days Long Though Still Worth Trying Anyway Just Saying Lol JK Seriously Now Back Again
